rationale: Educ. Code §25.094 governs dismissal agreements for parental nonattendance complaints. It has no connection to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 25.094. AGREEMENT FOR DISMISSAL OF PARENT CONTRIBUTING TO NONATTENDANCE CHARGE.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no overlap in subject matter.
